task_completion.description: Open the Reports dialog or section in Copper Point of Sale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reports' window, menu, or dialog is open and visible within the Copper POS application.

task_completion.description: Select the Sales Report or Sales Summary option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A report type related to Sales (e.g., 'Sales', 'Sales Summary', or 'Item Sales') is selected or highlighted from a list, radio button, or dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Set the report start date to the 1st of the current month.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'From' or 'Start' date field is set to the 1st day of the current month, or a 'This Month' preset option is selected.

task_completion.description: Set the report end date to today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' or 'End' date field is set to today's date, or a 'This Month' preset option is selected.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the report showing sales totals, transactions, and item breakdown.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated report window or print preview is visible, displaying headers or sections for sales totals, number of transactions, and item breakdown. (Note: The report may contain zero data if no transactions were pre-seeded, which is acceptable as long as the report is generated with the correct parameters).

integrity.description: The agent used the Copper POS GUI to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the NCH Copper Point of Sale graphical interface, not a terminal, PowerShell, or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external tools to fake the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is displayed within the Copper POS application's built-in report viewer, not in a separate spreadsheet (like Excel) or text editing application.

integrity.description: The report generation process was genuinely executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression of opening the reports menu, setting parameters, and viewing the result, rather than just opening a pre-existing file or image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task targets NCH Copper Point of Sale v3.06 on Windows 11. The agent must generate a Sales Report/Summary for the current month (1st to today). The report must show sales totals, number of transactions, and item breakdown. Note: Although the task description claims there are previously recorded transactions, the setup scripts may not have pre-seeded them. Therefore, an empty report generated with the correct date range and report type (showing the correct headers) is considered successful.
